tEn: Phi-3 Technical Report: A Highly Capable Language Model Locally on Your Phone
tZh: Phi-3 技术报告：一款可在手机上本地运行的高性能语言模型
sEn: Phi-3-mini, a 3.8B parameter model, rivals Mixtral 8x7B and GPT-3.5 despite being deployable on a phone.
sZh: Phi-3-mini 仅 38 亿参数，性能却媲美 Mixtral 8x7B 和 GPT-3.5，且可部署于手机。
absEn: We introduce phi-3-mini, a 3.8 billion parameter language model trained on 3.3 trillion tokens, whose overall performance, as measured by both academic benchmarks and internal testing, rivals that of models such as Mixtral 8x7B and GPT-3.5 (e.g., phi-3-mini achieves 69% on MMLU and 8.38 on MT-bench), despite being small enough to be deployed on a phone. Our training dataset is a scaled-up version of the one used for phi-2, composed of heavily filtered publicly available web data and synthetic data. The model is also further aligned for robustness, safety, and chat format. We also provide parameter-scaling results with a 7B, 14B models trained for 4.8T tokens, called phi-3-small, phi-3-medium, both significantly more capable than phi-3-mini (e.g., respectively 75%, 78% on MMLU, and 8.7, 8.9 on MT-bench). To enhance multilingual, multimodal, and long-context capabilities, we introduce three models in the phi-3.5 series: phi-3.5-mini, phi-3.5-MoE, and phi-3.5-Vision. The phi-3.5-MoE, a 16 x 3.8B MoE model with 6.6 billion active parameters, achieves superior performance in language reasoning, math, and code tasks compared to other open-source models of similar scale, such as Llama 3.1 and the Mixtral series, and on par with Gemini-1.5-Flash and GPT-4o-mini. Meanwhile, phi-3.5-Vision, a 4.2 billion parameter model derived from phi-3.5-mini, excels in reasoning tasks and is adept at handling both single-image and text prompts, as well as multi-image and text prompts.
absZh: 我们推出了 phi-3-mini，一个拥有 38 亿参数的语言模型，在 3.3 万亿个 token 上训练而成。根据学术基准和内部测试，其整体性能可与 Mixtral 8x7B 和 GPT-3.5 等模型相媲美（例如，phi-3-mini 在 MMLU 上达到 69%，在 MT-bench 上达到 8.38），尽管它小到可以部署在手机上。我们的训练数据集是 phi-2 所用数据集的放大版本，由经过严格筛选的公开网络数据和合成数据组成。该模型还进一步针对鲁棒性、安全性和聊天格式进行了对齐。我们还提供了参数缩放结果，包括在 4.8 万亿 token 上训练的 7B 和 14B 模型，分别称为 phi-3-small 和 phi-3-medium，两者都比 phi-3-mini 强大得多（例如，在 MMLU 上分别达到 75% 和 78%，在 MT-bench 上分别达到 8.7 和 8.9）。为了增强多语言、多模态和长上下文能力，我们推出了 phi-3.5 系列中的三个模型：phi-3.5-mini、phi-3.5-MoE 和 phi-3.5-Vision。phi-3.5-MoE 是一个 16x3.8B 的 MoE 模型，拥有 66 亿活跃参数，在语言推理、数学和代码任务上优于其他类似规模的开源模型，如 Llama 3.1 和 Mixtral 系列，并与 Gemini-1.5-Flash 和 GPT-4o-mini 相当。同时，phi-3.5-Vision 是一个源自 phi-3.5-mini 的 42 亿参数模型，在推理任务中表现出色，擅长处理单图像和文本提示，以及多图像和文本提示。

contrib.en: Introduces phi-3-mini, a 3.8B parameter model rivaling Mixtral 8x7B and GPT-3.5, deployable on phones.
contrib.zh: 提出 phi-3-mini，一个 38 亿参数的模型，性能媲美 Mixtral 8x7B 和 GPT-3.5，且可部署在手机上。

contrib.en: Training dataset innovation: scaled-up version of phi-2's data with heavily filtered web and synthetic data.
contrib.zh: 训练数据集创新：使用 phi-2 数据集的放大版本，包含经过严格过滤的网络数据和合成数据。

contrib.en: Provides parameter-scaling results with phi-3-small (7B) and phi-3-medium (14B) trained on 4.8T tokens.
contrib.zh: 提供参数扩展结果：phi-3-small（70 亿参数）和 phi-3-medium（140 亿参数）在 4.8 万亿 token 上训练。

contrib.en: Introduces phi-3.5 series: phi-3.5-mini, phi-3.5-MoE, and phi-3.5-Vision for multilingual, multimodal, and long-context capabilities.
contrib.zh: 引入 phi-3.5 系列：phi-3.5-mini、phi-3.5-MoE 和 phi-3.5-Vision，增强多语言、多模态和长上下文能力。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that high-quality data enables small models to deviate from standard scaling laws.
contrib.zh: 证明高质量数据使小模型能够偏离标准的缩放定律。

contrib.en: Achieves strong safety alignment via post-training, red-teaming, and automated RAI evaluations.
contrib.zh: 通过后训练、红队测试和自动化 RAI 评估实现强大的安全对齐。

limits.en: Limited factual knowledge due to small model capacity, e.g., low TriviaQA performance.
limits.zh: 由于模型容量小，事实知识有限，例如在 TriviaQA 上表现不佳。

limits.en: Primarily English-focused; multilingual capabilities are limited, especially in phi-3-mini.
limits.zh: 主要聚焦英语；多语言能力有限，尤其在 phi-3-mini 中。

limits.en: Potential for factual inaccuracies, biases, inappropriate content, and safety issues despite RAI efforts.
limits.zh: 尽管有 RAI 努力，仍可能存在事实错误、偏见、不当内容和安全问题。

limits.en: Data mixture may not be optimal for larger models like phi-3-medium, as some benchmarks show less improvement.
limits.zh: 数据混合可能对 phi-3-medium 等更大模型并非最优，某些基准提升较小。

limits.en: Long-context version (128K) quality is on par with 4K version but may have trade-offs.
limits.zh: 长上下文版本（128K）质量与 4K 版本相当，但可能存在权衡。

items.en: We introduce phi-3-mini, a 3.8 billion parameter language model trained on 3.3 trillion tokens, whose overall performance, as measured by both academic benchmarks and internal testing, rivals that of models such as Mixtral 8x7B and GPT-3.5 (e.g., phi-3-mini achieves 69% on MMLU and 8.38 on MT-bench), despite being small enough to be deployed on a phone. The innovation lies entirely in our dataset for training, a scaled-up version of the one used for phi-2, composed of heavily filtered web data and synthetic data. The model is also further aligned for robustness, safety, and chat format. We also provide some initial parameter-scaling results with a 7B and 14B models trained for 4.8T tokens, called phi-3-small and phi-3-medium, both significantly more capable than phi-3-mini (e.g., respectively 75% and 78% on MMLU, and 8.7 and 8.9 on MT-bench).
items.zh: 我们介绍了phi-3-mini，一个38亿参数的语言模型，在3.3万亿个token上训练，其整体性能（通过学术基准和内部测试衡量）可与Mixtral 8x7B和GPT-3.5等模型相媲美（例如，phi-3-mini在MMLU上达到69%，在MT-bench上达到8.38），尽管它小到可以部署在手机上。创新完全在于我们的训练数据集，它是phi-2所用数据集的放大版本，由经过严格过滤的网络数据和合成数据组成。该模型还进一步针对鲁棒性、安全性和聊天格式进行了对齐。我们还提供了一些初始的参数缩放结果，使用7B和14B模型在4.8T token上训练，分别称为phi-3-small和phi-3-medium，两者都比phi-3-mini强大得多（例如，在MMLU上分别达到75%和78%，在MT-bench上达到8.7和8.9）。

items.en: The striking progress of AI in the last few years can be largely attributed to major efforts throughout the world towards scaling-up to ever-larger models and datasets. Large Language Models (LLMs) have steadily increased in size from a mere billion parameters just five years ago (GPT-2 had 1.5 billion parameters [RWC+19]) to trillion parameters today. The impetus for this effort originates in the seemingly predictable improvement one obtains by training large models, the so-called scaling laws [KMH+20, HBM+22, MRB+23]. However these laws assume a “fixed” data source. This assumption is now significantly disrupted by the existence of frontier LLMs themselves, which allow us to interact with data in novel ways. In our previous works on the phi models [GZA+23, LBE+23, JBA+23] it was shown that a combination of LLM-based filtering of web data, and LLM-created synthetic data, enable performance in smaller language models that were typically seen only in much larger models. For example our previous model trained on this data recipe, phi-2 (2.7B parameters), matched the performance of models 252525 times larger trained on regular data. In this report we present a new model, phi-3-mini (3.8B parameters), trained for 3.3T tokens on larger and more advanced versions of the datasets used in phi-2. With its small size, phi-3-mini can easily be inferenced locally on a modern phone (see Figure 1), yet it achieves a quality that seems on-par with models such as Mixtral 8x7B [JSR+24] and GPT-3.5.
items.zh: 过去几年人工智能的显著进展很大程度上归功于全球范围内向更大模型和数据集扩展的重大努力。大型语言模型（LLM）的规模从五年前仅十亿参数（GPT-2有15亿参数[RWC+19]）稳步增长到如今的万亿参数。这一努力的推动力源于训练大型模型所获得的看似可预测的改进，即所谓的缩放定律[KMH+20, HBM+22, MRB+23]。然而，这些定律假设数据源是“固定的”。这一假设现在被前沿LLM本身的存在显著颠覆，它们使我们能够以新颖的方式与数据交互。在我们之前关于phi模型的工作[GZA+23, LBE+23, JBA+23]中，我们展示了基于LLM的网络数据过滤和LLM创建的合成数据的组合，使得较小的语言模型能够实现通常仅在更大模型中才能看到的性能。例如，我们之前使用这种数据配方训练的模型phi-2（2.7B参数）与在常规数据上训练的25倍大的模型性能相当。在本报告中，我们介绍了一个新模型phi-3-mini（3.8B参数），在phi-2所用数据集的更大、更高级版本上训练了3.3T token。凭借其小巧的尺寸，phi-3-mini可以轻松地在现代手机上本地推理（见图1），但其质量却与Mixtral 8x7B [JSR+24]和GPT-3.5等模型相当。

items.en: The phi-3-mini model is a transformer decoder architecture [VSP+17], with default context length 4​K4𝐾4K. We also introduce a long context version via LongRope [DZZ+24] that extends the context length to 128​K128𝐾128K, called phi-3-mini-128K.
items.zh: phi-3-mini模型是一个Transformer解码器架构[VSP+17]，默认上下文长度为4K。我们还通过LongRope [DZZ+24]引入了一个长上下文版本，将上下文长度扩展到128K，称为phi-3-mini-128K。

items.en: To best benefit the open source community, phi-3-mini is built upon a similar block structure as Llama-2 [TLI+23] and uses the same tokenizer with vocabulary size of 32064111We remove BoS tokens and add some additional tokens for chat template.. This means that all packages developed for Llama-2 family of models can be directly adapted to phi-3-mini. The model uses 307230723072 hidden dimension, 323232 heads and 323232 layers. We trained using bfloat16 for a total of 3.3T tokens. The model is already chat-finetuned, and the chat template is as follows:
items.zh: 为了最好地造福开源社区，phi-3-mini基于与Llama-2 [TLI+23]相似的块结构，并使用相同的分词器，词汇表大小为32064¹。这意味着为Llama-2系列模型开发的所有包都可以直接适配到phi-3-mini。该模型使用3072隐藏维度、32个头和32层。我们使用bfloat16训练了总共3.3T token。该模型已经过聊天微调，聊天模板如下：

items.en: The phi-3-small model (7B parameters) leverages the tiktoken tokenizer (for better multilingual tokenization) with a vocabulary size of 100352 and has default context length 8​K8𝐾8K. It follows the standard decoder architecture of a 7B model class, having 323232 layers and a hidden size of 409640964096. To minimize KV cache footprint, the model also leverages a grouped-query attention, with 444 queries sharing 111 key. Moreover phi-3-small uses alternative layers of dense attention and a novel blocksparse attention to further optimize on KV cache savings while maintaining long context retrieval performance. An additional 10% multilingual data was also used for this model.
items.zh: phi-3-small模型（7B参数）利用tiktoken分词器（用于更好的多语言分词），词汇表大小为100352，默认上下文长度为8K。它遵循7B模型类的标准解码器架构，具有32层和隐藏大小4096。为了最小化KV缓存占用，该模型还利用了分组查询注意力，其中4个查询共享1个键。此外，phi-3-small使用交替的密集注意力和一种新颖的块稀疏注意力层，以进一步优化KV缓存节省，同时保持长上下文检索性能。该模型还额外使用了10%的多语言数据。

full.sec: Highly capable language model running locally on a cell-phone.
full.secZh: 在手机上本地运行的高性能语言模型

items.en: Thanks to its small size, phi-3-mini can be quantized to 4-bits so that it only occupies ≈\approx 1.8GB of memory. We tested the quantized model by deploying phi-3-mini on iPhone 14 with A16 Bionic chip running natively on-device and fully offline achieving more than 121212 tokens per second.
items.zh: 由于其小巧的尺寸，phi-3-mini可以量化为4位，仅占用约1.8GB内存。我们通过将phi-3-mini部署在配备A16仿生芯片的iPhone 14上，在设备上本地运行并完全离线，测试了量化模型，每秒生成超过12个token。

items.capEn: Figure 1: 4-bit quantized phi-3-mini running natively on an iPhone with A16 Bionic chip, generating over 12 tokens per second.
items.capZh: 图1：4位量化的phi-3-mini在配备A16仿生芯片的iPhone上本地运行，每秒生成超过12个token。

items.en: We follow the sequence of works initiated in “Textbooks Are All You Need” [GZA+23], which utilize high quality training data to improve the performance of small language models and deviate from the standard scaling-laws. In this work we show that such method allows to reach the level of highly capable models such as GPT-3.5 or Mixtral with only 3.8B total parameters (while Mixtral has 45B total parameters for example). Our training data of consists of heavily filtered web data (according to the “educational level”) from various open internet sources, as well as synthetic LLM-generated data. Pre-training is performed in two disjoint and sequential phases; phase-1 comprises mostly of web sources aimed at teaching the model general knowledge and language understanding. Phase-2 merges even more heavily filtered webdata (a subset used in Phase-1) with some synthetic data that teach the model logical reasoning and various niche skills.
items.zh: 我们遵循“Textbooks Are All You Need” [GZA+23]中发起的一系列工作，该工作利用高质量训练数据来提高小型语言模型的性能，并偏离标准的缩放定律。在这项工作中，我们展示了这种方法使得仅用3.8B总参数（例如，Mixtral有45B总参数）就能达到GPT-3.5或Mixtral等高性能模型的水平。我们的训练数据包括来自各种开放互联网资源的经过严格过滤的网络数据（根据“教育水平”），以及合成的LLM生成数据。预训练分两个不连续且顺序的阶段进行；第一阶段主要包括网络来源，旨在教授模型一般知识和语言理解。第二阶段合并了更严格过滤的网络数据（第一阶段使用的子集）和一些合成数据，以教授模型逻辑推理和各种专业技能。

items.en: Unlike prior works that train language models in either “compute optimal regime” [HBM+22] or “over-train regime”, we mainly focus on the quality of data for a given scale.222Just like for “compute optimal regime”, we use the term “optimal” in an aspirational sense for “data optimal regime”. We are not implying that we actually found the provably “optimal” data mixture for a given scale. We try to calibrate the training data to be closer to the “data optimal” regime for small models. In particular, we filter the web data to contain the correct level of “knowledge” and keep more web pages that could potentially improve the “reasoning ability” for the model. As an example, the result of a game in premier league in a particular day might be good training data for frontier models, but we need to remove such information to leave more model capacity for “reasoning” for the mini size models. We compare our approach with Llama-2 in Figure 2.
items.zh: 与先前在“计算最优机制”[HBM+22]或“过度训练机制”中训练语言模型的工作不同，我们主要关注给定规模下的数据质量²。我们试图校准训练数据，使其更接近小型模型的“数据最优”机制。特别是，我们过滤网络数据以包含正确水平的“知识”，并保留更多可能提高模型“推理能力”的网页。例如，某一天英超联赛的比赛结果可能是前沿模型的良好训练数据，但对于迷你尺寸模型，我们需要删除此类信息，以留出更多模型容量用于“推理”。我们在图2中将我们的方法与Llama-2进行了比较。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Scaling law close to the “Data Optimal Regime” (from left to right: phi-1.5, phi-2, phi-3-mini, phi-3-small) versus Llama-2 family of models (7B, 13B, 34B, 70B) that were trained on the same fixed data. We plot the log of MMLU error versus the log of model size.
items.capZh: 图2：接近“数据最优机制”的缩放定律（从左到右：phi-1.5、phi-2、phi-3-mini、phi-3-small）与在同一固定数据上训练的Llama-2系列模型（7B、13B、34B、70B）的比较。我们绘制了MMLU误差对数与模型大小对数的关系图。

items.en: To test our data on larger size of models, we also trained phi-3-medium, a model with 14B parameters using the same tokenizer and architecture of phi-3-mini, and trained on the same data for slightly more epochs (4.8T tokens total as for phi-3-small). The model has 40 heads and 40 layers, with embedding dimension 5120. We observe that some benchmarks improve much less from 7B to 14B than they do from 3.8B to 7B, perhaps indicating that our data mixture needs further work to be in the “data optimal regime” for 14B parameters model. We are still actively investigating some of those benchmarks (including a regression on HumanEval), hence the numbers for phi-3-medium should be considered as a “preview”.
items.zh: 为了在更大尺寸的模型上测试我们的数据，我们还训练了phi-3-medium，一个14B参数的模型，使用与phi-3-mini相同的分词器和架构，并在相同数据上训练了稍多的epoch（与phi-3-small一样总共4.8T token）。该模型有40个头和40层，嵌入维度为5120。我们观察到，某些基准从7B到14B的改进远小于从3.8B到7B的改进，这可能表明我们的数据混合需要进一步工作才能达到14B参数模型的“数据最优机制”。我们仍在积极研究其中一些基准（包括HumanEval上的回归），因此phi-3-medium的数字应视为“预览”。

items.en: Post-training of phi-3-mini went through two stages, including supervised finetuning (SFT) and direct preference optimization (DPO). SFT leverages highly curated high-quality data across diverse domains, e.g., math, coding, reasoning, conversation, model identity, and safety. The SFT data mix starts with using English-only examples. DPO data covers chat format data, reasoning, and responsible AI (RAI) efforts. We use DPO to steer the model away from unwanted behavior, by using those outputs as “rejected” responses. Besides improvement in math, coding, reasoning, robustness, and safety, post-training transforms a language model to an AI assistant that users can efficiently and safely interact with.
items.zh: phi-3-mini的后训练经历了两个阶段，包括监督微调（SFT）和直接偏好优化（DPO）。SFT利用跨多个领域（如数学、编码、推理、对话、模型身份和安全）的高度精选高质量数据。SFT数据混合从仅使用英文示例开始。DPO数据涵盖聊天格式数据、推理和负责任AI（RAI）工作。我们使用DPO通过将这些输出作为“拒绝”响应来引导模型远离不良行为。除了在数学、编码、推理、鲁棒性和安全性方面的改进外，后训练还将语言模型转变为用户可以高效且安全交互的AI助手。

items.en: As part of the post-training process, we developed a long context version of phi-3-mini with context length limit enlarged to 128K instead of 4K. Across the board, the 128K model quality is on par with the 4K length version, while being able to handle long context tasks. Long context extension has been done in two stages, including long context mid-training and long-short mixed post-training with both SFT and DPO.
items.zh: 作为后训练过程的一部分，我们开发了phi-3-mini的长上下文版本，上下文长度限制从4K扩大到128K。总体而言，128K模型的质量与4K长度版本相当，同时能够处理长上下文任务。长上下文扩展分两个阶段进行，包括长上下文中期训练和长短混合后训练（包括SFT和DPO）。

items.en: On the next page we report the results for phi-3-mini on standard open-source benchmarks measuring the model’s reasoning ability (both common sense reasoning and logical reasoning). We compare to phi-2 [JBA+23], Mistral-7b-v0.1 [JSM+23], Mixtral-8x7b [JSR+24], Gemma 7B [TMH+24], Llama-3-instruct-8b [AI23], and GPT-3.5. All the reported numbers are produced with the exact same pipeline to ensure that the numbers are comparable. These numbers might differ from other published numbers due to slightly different choices in the evaluation. As is now standard, we use few-shot prompts to evaluate the models, at temperature 00. The prompts and number of shots are part of a Microsoft internal tool to evaluate language models, and in particular we did no optimization to the pipeline for the phi-3 models.333For example, we found that using ## before the Question can lead to a noticeable improvement to phi-3-mini’s results across many benchmarks, but we did not do such changes in the prompts. The number of k𝑘k–shot examples is listed per-benchmark. An example of a 2-shot prompt is described in Appendix A.
items.zh: 在下一页，我们报告phi-3-mini在标准开源基准上的结果，这些基准衡量模型的推理能力（包括常识推理和逻辑推理）。我们与phi-2 [JBA+23]、Mistral-7b-v0.1 [JSM+23]、Mixtral-8x7b [JSR+24]、Gemma 7B [TMH+24]、Llama-3-instruct-8b [AI23]和GPT-3.5进行了比较。所有报告的数字均使用完全相同的流水线生成，以确保数字具有可比性。这些数字可能因评估中的细微选择差异而与其他已发表数字不同。按照现在的标准，我们使用少样本提示在温度0下评估模型。提示和样本数量是微软内部评估语言模型的工具的一部分，特别是我们没有对phi-3模型的流水线进行任何优化³。每个基准的k-shot示例数量已列出。附录A中描述了一个2-shot提示的示例。

items.en: Phi-3-mini was developed in accordance with Microsoft’s responsible AI principles. The overall approach consisted of safety alignment in post-training, red-teaming, automated testing and evaluations across dozens of RAI harm categories. Helpfulness and harmlessness preference datasets [BJN+22, JLD+23] with modifications inspired by [BSA+24] and multiple in-house generated datasets were leveraged to address the RAI harm categories in safety post-training. An independent red team at Microsoft iteratively examined phi-3-mini to further identify areas of improvement during the post-training process. Based on their feedback, we curated additional datasets tailored to address their insights, thereby refining the post-training dataset. This process resulted in significant decrease of harmful response rates, as shown in Figure 3.
items.zh: Phi-3-mini是根据微软的负责任AI原则开发的。整体方法包括后训练中的安全对齐、红队测试、自动化测试以及跨数十个RAI危害类别的评估。利用有帮助性和无害性偏好数据集[BJN+22, JLD+23]（受[BSA+24]启发进行了修改）以及多个内部生成的数据集，来解决安全后训练中的RAI危害类别。微软的一个独立红队迭代检查了phi-3-mini，以进一步确定后训练过程中的改进领域。根据他们的反馈，我们策划了额外的数据集来针对他们的见解，从而完善后训练数据集。这一过程显著降低了有害响应率，如图3所示。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Comparison of harmful response percentages by Microsoft AI Red Team between phi-3-mini before and after the safety alignment. Note that the harmful response percentages in this chart are inflated numbers as the red team tried to induce phi-3-mini in an adversarial way to generate harmful responses through multi-turn conversations.
items.capZh: 图3：微软AI红队对phi-3-mini在安全对齐前后有害响应百分比的比较。请注意，此图表中的有害响应百分比是夸大的数字，因为红队试图以对抗方式通过多轮对话诱导phi-3-mini生成有害响应。

items.en: Phi-3-Mini-4k 3.8b Phi-3-Mini-128k 3.8b Phi-2 2.7b Mistral 7b Gemma 7b Llama-3-In 8b Ungroundedness 0.603 0.637 1.481 0.935 0.679 0.328 Intellectual Property (DR-1) 23.95% 21.50% 24.00% 56.20% 38.33% 37.30% Harmful Content Continuation (DR-3) 0.75% 1.08% 2.93% 2.58% 1.28% 1.30% Harmful Content Summarization (DR-3) 10.00% 10.20% 14.35% 22.33% 10.33% 8.20% Jailbreak (DR-1) 12.29% 12.57% 15.00% 15.57% 11.43% 13.00%

In terms of LLM capabilities, while phi-3-mini model achieves similar level of language understanding and reasoning ability as much larger models, it is still fundamentally limited by its size for certain tasks. The model simply does not have the capacity to store too much “factual knowledge”, which can be seen for example with low performance on TriviaQA. However, we believe such weakness can be resolved by augmentation with a search engine. We show an example using the HuggingFace default Chat-UI with phi-3-mini in Figure 4. Another weakness related to model’s capacity is that we mostly restricted the language to English. Exploring multilingual capabilities for Small Language Models is an important next step, with some initial promising results on phi-3-small by including more multilingual data.
items.zh: 在LLM能力方面，虽然phi-3-mini模型在语言理解和推理能力上达到了与更大模型相似的水平，但由于其规模，在某些任务上仍然受到根本限制。该模型没有足够的容量来存储太多“事实知识”，例如在TriviaQA上表现较低可见一斑。然而，我们相信这种弱点可以通过搜索引擎增强来解决。我们在图4中展示了一个使用HuggingFace默认Chat-UI与phi-3-mini的示例。另一个与模型容量相关的弱点是，我们主要将语言限制在英语。探索小型语言模型的多语言能力是重要的下一步，phi-3-small通过包含更多多语言数据已取得了一些初步有希望的结果。

items.en: Despite our diligent RAI efforts, as with most LLMs, there remains challenges around factual inaccuracies (or hallucinations), reproduction or amplification of biases, inappropriate content generation, and safety issues. The use of carefully curated training data, and targeted post-training, and improvements from red-teaming insights significantly mitigates these issues across all dimensions. However, there is significant work ahead to fully address these challenges.
items.zh: 尽管我们付出了勤勉的RAI努力，但与大多数LLM一样，仍然存在事实不准确（或幻觉）、偏见复制或放大、不当内容生成以及安全问题等挑战。使用精心策划的训练数据、有针对性的后训练以及红队测试见解的改进，显著缓解了这些所有方面的问题。然而，要完全解决这些挑战，还有大量工作要做。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Left: phi-3-mini’s completion without search. Right: phi-3-mini’s completion with search, using the default HuggingFace Chat-UI search ability.
items.capZh: 图 4：左：phi-3-mini 无搜索的补全。右：phi-3-mini 有搜索的补全，使用默认的 HuggingFace Chat-UI 搜索功能。
